settings.heading: A central gateway for practical business operations support
settings.text: Find the right route for running operations, improving recurring work, accessing practical resources, and using available offers or support pathways.

settings.heading: Choose the operations pathway
settings.text: Start with the kind of operational outcome you need, then move into services, resources, offers or support.

settings.title: Run operations
settings.text: Browse services for recurring work, controls, admin systems and operating support.

settings.title: Improve operations
settings.text: Use practical tools, templates and service pathways to clean up recurring work.

settings.title: Access tools and offers
settings.text: Find marketplace pathways, business resources and support when the right next step is unclear.

settings.heading: Run, improve and support business operations
settings.text: Use the hub to move into a practical service, resource or support route without guessing where to start.

settings.title: Run operations
settings.text: Support for recurring work, accountability, controls and operating rhythm.

settings.title: Improve operations
settings.text: Support for registers, calendars, documentation, workflows and knowledge bases.

settings.title: Access tools and offers
settings.text: Use marketplace pathways, practical resources and partner opportunities where available.

settings.heading: Useful starting points for business operators
settings.text: These links keep users moving without sending them to destinations that do not exist yet.

settings.title: Operations On-Demand Services
settings.text: A real collection for operational services and support products.

settings.title: Compliance Calendar and Obligations Register
settings.text: Implementation support for recurring obligations, calendars and registers.

settings.title: Business NBN
settings.text: Check business connectivity readiness and next steps.

settings.heading: Partner offers and operational opportunities
settings.text: Explore available partner offers, marketplace pathways and practical business opportunities as they become available.

settings.title: Marketplace pathways
settings.text: Explore marketplace support, buyer and seller pathways, partner offers and related guidance.

settings.title: Marketplace Seller Compliance Toolkit
settings.text: A real active toolkit for sellers managing marketplace terms, listings, refunds and customer communications.

settings.heading: Use support when the right operational path is unclear
settings.text: Send the context and the outcome you need so RBP can route you to the right service, resource or next step.
settings.aside_text: Tell us what is stuck, what has already been tried, who owns the work and whether you need advice, delivery or a self-serve resource.

settings.heading: Find the right operations pathway
settings.text: Start with the operational outcome, then choose the service, resource, offer or support route that fits.
